yl.t: abbr. 年轻女士（young lady）；屈服极限（yield limit）

yla.t: abbr. Langara; British Columbia; Canada 加拿大; open landing lighter 敞舱登陆驳（美国海军舰船符号）

ylang ylang oil.t: [医] 夷兰油(夷兰是产于马来西亚的一种乔木)

ylang-ylang.t:
n. 依兰(菲律宾产)
[医] 夷兰(产于马来亚的一种乔木)
ylang-ylang.d: n evergreen Asian tree with aromatic greenish-yellow flowers yielding a volatile oil; widely grown in the tropics as an ornamental

yld.t: abbr. yield 收益，收益率，产量

yle.t: abbr. 少儿英语（Young Learners English）

ylem.t: n. 伊伦(宇宙演化论中所假设的最原始物质)
ylem.d: n (cosmology) the original matter that (according to the big bang theory) existed before the formation of the chemical elements
